title: Agentic Swarm Marketplace MCP (URL)
description: Optional settings for Smithery Connect. Gateway forwards values as query params or headers per field.

t54SellerPublicBaseUrl.title: T54 seller base URL
t54SellerPublicBaseUrl.description: Public origin for the XRPL T54 seller (no trailing slash).

marketplacePublicBaseUrl.title: Marketplace API origin
marketplacePublicBaseUrl.description: HTTPS origin for Base x402 contract tools (no trailing slash).

x402BrokerPayMode.title: x402 broker rail
x402BrokerPayMode.description: Settlement mode: mock, xrpl_testnet, base_usdc, etc.

x402McpDryRun.title: Dry run
x402McpDryRun.description: 1 for mock settlement only; 0 for real rail when configured.
